content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Solve Collaboration
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome collaboration blockers. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for freelancers.
content.answer_block: Collaboration bottlenecks destroy freelance margins. The Antigravity project template solves this by enforcing standardized architecture and modular codebases. By integrating Claude Code, you automate synchronization and documentation, turning fragmented local work into a professional, team-ready environment that clients can audit, maintain, and scale without friction.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a codebase that looks like a war zone. Your client needs a feature update, but your local setup is trapped in a silo, and the lack of a shared structure makes collaboration feel like hand-to-hand combat. You aren't just losing time; you're losing the professional reputation that commands premium rates.

It’s time to move beyond the 'it works on my machine' era. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you transform your workflow into a repeatable, modular system. When paired with Claude Code, you don't just write code—you orchestrate a professional development environment that turns every freelance project into a scalable asset.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Start by deploying the base template to ensure your directory structure is standardized for multi-developer readiness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with support for modular feature components and centralized configuration.

steps.title: Define the Module Architecture
steps.description: Break your application into isolated domains to prevent tight coupling, making it easier for future contributors to navigate your work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure for a modular SaaS application following the Antigravity pattern, separating services, UI components, and API handlers.

steps.title: Integrate Configuration Sync
steps.description: Eliminate environment variable drift by using the template's centralized config handler, ensuring everyone uses the same keys.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure, schema-validated configuration management system that syncs across environments using the Antigravity template specs.

steps.title: Automate Documentation with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate project READMEs and contributor guidelines automatically as you build, ensuring the codebase is self-documenting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and generate a comprehensive README.md that explains how to onboard a new developer to this Antigravity project.

steps.title: Execute Collaborative CI/CD
steps.description: Set up a lightweight workflow that validates your code against the project standard before every commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a pre-commit hook that runs the Antigravity linting and structure validation suite.

pro_tips: Always use strict schema validation for your environment variables to prevent 'ghost' bugs during handovers.
Treat your project documentation as a living code artifact; if it isn't generated via Claude, it will inevitably become stale.
Use Antigravity's modular isolation to build 'pluggable' features that you can resell to future clients.
Keep your Claude Code session scoped to specific features to prevent the AI from hallucinating across large, complex directories.
Leverage the Antigravity standard naming conventions to make your code look like it was built by a senior engineering team, not a solo freelancer.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Architecture: https://saas-patterns.dev
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded, push your base template to a private repository and invite a peer to perform a code review using the generated documentation.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own code and start shipping like a senior architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
